text:
Once upon a time, there was a unicorn who loved nothing more than collecting pebbles that shone like diamonds. Every morning she would race through meadows and valleys, bouncing over pebble-strewn paths until she found a particularly sparkling gem.

One day, as she was admiring her collection under a willow tree, a wise old owl perched nearby. "Ah," the owl hooted. "I've heard tell of such a remarkable collection. Just yesterday I saw one pebble that twinkled like the moon!"

The unicorn's eyes sparkled with excitement. "Would you like to hear the story?"

The owl tilted its head. "Well, once upon a time, a wise old owl discovered that sharing the secrets of his collection was the secret to endless enjoyment. He'd sit by the moonlit pond and tell how a pebble shaped like a tiny fox would gleam under the moonlight.

As the owl would tell his stories, the moonlit fox would
